definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He went out despite the rain.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He went out despite the rain.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'in spite of').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'in spite of').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In addition to English, he speaks French.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: In addition to English, he speaks French.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to add another item or piece of information.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to add another item or piece of information.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He went out in spite of the rain.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He went out in spite of the rain.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'despite').
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to show a contrast or unexpected outcome (synonym of 'despite').]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I am speaking on behalf of my team.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I am speaking on behalf of my team.
definitions.usage_context_en: As a representative of someone or for someone's benefit.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As a representative of someone or for someone's benefit.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He bought the car regardless of the cost.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: He bought the car regardless of the cost.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to mean 'without paying attention to' or 'despite'.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to mean 'without paying attention to' or 'despite'.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Please finish the report prior to the meeting.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Please finish the report prior to the meeting.
definitions.usage_context_en: A formal way to say 'before' a specific time or event.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: A formal way to say 'before' a specific time or event.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I prefer tea, as opposed to coffee.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I prefer tea, as opposed to coffee.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to make a direct contrast between two things.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to make a direct contrast between two things.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: I have a question concerning your report.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: I have a question concerning your report.
definitions.usage_context_en: On the subject of or in connection with; about.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: On the subject of or in connection with; about.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: As for the money, we will pay you tomorrow.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: As for the money, we will pay you tomorrow.
definitions.usage_context_en: Used to introduce a new topic or change the subject.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Used to introduce a new topic or change the subject.]

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Regarding the contract, we agree to the terms.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_example_es: Regarding the contract, we agree to the terms.
definitions.usage_context_es: [TRADUCIR AL FR: In respect of; concerning.]
